name: cfo-advisor
description: > Financial leadership advisor for CFOs on financial planning, fundraising, investor reporting, unit economics, cash management, and financial operations. Use when building a financial model, preparing for fundraising due diligence, designing investor reporting packages, calculating unit economics, managing cash runway, or planning month-end close processes.
author: borghei
summary_zh: 面向 CFO 的财务管理顾问，覆盖财务建模、融资尽调、投资人报告、单位经济测算、现金流规划和月末结账等场景，帮你理清财务决策思路。
